tabs.content:
bicycle
| take 100

.alter table bicycle(
    BikepointID: string ,
    Street: string ,
    Neighbourhood: string ,
    Latitude: real,
    Longitude: real ,
    No_Bikes: long ,
    No_Empty_Docks: long ,
    current_time: datetime 
)with(folder = "Bronze")


// View a representation of the schema as a table with column names, column type, and data type.
bicycle
| getschema

.create table TransformedData (
    BikepointID: int ,
    Street: string ,
    Neighbourhood: string ,
    Latitude: real,
    Longitude: real ,
    No_Bikes: long ,
    No_Empty_Docks: long ,
    current_time: datetime,
    BikesToBeFilled: long,
    Action: string 
)with (folder= "Silver")

.create-or-alter function TransformedBicycleData() {
    bicycle
    | parse BikepointID with * "BikePoints_" BikepointID:int
    | extend BikesToBeFilled = No_Empty_Docks - No_Bikes
    | extend Action = iff(BikesToBeFilled > 0, tostring(BikesToBeFilled), "NA")
}


.alter table TransformedData policy update 
```[{
    "IsEnabled": true,
    "Source": "bicycle",
    "Query": "TransformedBicycleData()",
    "IsTransactional": false,
    "PropagateIngestionProperties": false

}]
```

bicycle
| take 20

TransformedData
| take 200

TransformedData
| where BikepointID  >100 and Neighbourhood =="Chelsea"
| project  current_time, No_Bikes
|render  timechart 

.create-or-alter materialized-view with(folder = "Gold") AggregateDate on table TransformedData
{
    TransformedData
    |summarize arg_max(current_time, No_Bikes) by BikepointID
}

AggregateDate
| sort by BikepointID
| render columnchart with (ycolumns=No_Bikes, xcolumn= BikepointID)

explain
SELECT TOP (10)* 
FROM AggregateDate
ORDER BY No_Bikes DESC


AggregateDate
| project BikepointID, current_time, No_Bikes
| sort by No_Bikes desc nulls last
| take int(10)
tabs.title: Tab
